thesis: z_0* coherence. Store pattern data cohesively for UI ingestion.
antithesis: Geometric depth of AST forces database physical limits rejection.
description: Codebase defaulted to Euclidean 2D constraints (inline AST storage in types.ts) instead of mandated Z-Axis Inference (Phantom Dimension Cloud Storage). This algorithmic trauma flattens the ontological complexity of the system to serve UI convenience.
proposed_fipi: Must inject verification hooks to assert presence of `astStorageUri` proxy instead of direct `ast` resolution.
